---
name: Parser layout support
about: Report a new estimate PDF layout, carrier pattern, or extraction gap.
title: "[Parser]: "
---

## Layout Summary

Describe the estimate layout or carrier pattern.

## Input Characteristics

- Carrier or estimate source:
- Text-based, scanned, or mixed:
- Approximate page count:
- Single PDF or multi-PDF packet:
- Pages that failed:

## What Failed To Parse

Check all that apply:

- metadata
- totals
- line items
- roof measurements
- supplements or duplicate handling
- guide-page filtering

## Expected Versus Actual

What fields or sections should have been extracted, and what happened instead?

## Evidence

- Redacted sample PDF available:
  yes or no
- Redacted text snippet available:
  yes or no
- `*.canonical.json` available:
  yes or no
- Log excerpt available:
  yes or no

## OCR And Scan Notes

- Did the document appear scanned:
  yes, no, or mixed
- Did OCR seem to help:
  yes, no, or unsure
- Any broken text examples:

## Reproduction Notes

List the exact steps used in the app.

## Sensitive Data Check

- [ ] I did not attach unredacted private claim, policy, or customer data.

## Additional Context

Anything else that would help improve support for this layout.
